agents.name: Alert Correlator
agents.desc: Ingests signals from Prometheus, Datadog, Azure Monitor and ITSM. Correlates thousands of alerts into actionable incidents. Noise reduction: 94%.

anatomy.trigger: Alert threshold breach from any connected monitoring source
anatomy.process: Deduplicate, correlate, pattern match against vector DB of historical incidents, risk score
anatomy.output: Single actionable incident with context — pushed to RCA Engine and ServiceNow

agents.name: Log Analyser
agents.desc: Deep analysis of application and infrastructure logs. Identifies error patterns, performance degradation and anomalous behaviour across the full estate.

anatomy.trigger: Incident raised by Alert Correlator or threshold anomaly detected
anatomy.process: Query logs across time window, identify error patterns, correlate with metrics, rank hypotheses
anatomy.output: Log evidence package with top 3 root cause hypotheses — passed to RCA Engine

agents.name: RCA Engine
agents.desc: Traverses the service dependency graph and queries the vector database of historical incidents to identify root cause with confidence score. The diagnostic core of ZeroOps.

anatomy.trigger: Log evidence package from Log Analyser
anatomy.process: Graph traversal of service dependencies, vector similarity search against 24 months of incidents, confidence scoring
anatomy.output: Root cause with confidence score, causal chain, recommended remediation — triggers Remediation Agent or HiTL

agents.name: Remediation Agent
agents.desc: Selects and executes the appropriate remediation action — from the knowledge base or AI-generated plan. Executes via Ansible, Kubernetes, SAP RFC or REST API. Validates recovery before closing.

anatomy.trigger: Confirmed root cause from RCA Engine (risk < 25) or HiTL approval (risk 25–74)
anatomy.process: Select remediation from KB, validate against risk thresholds, execute via appropriate tool, monitor recovery
anatomy.output: Remediation executed, recovery validated, ticket updated in ServiceNow

agents.name: Change Validator
agents.desc: Pre-validates every proposed action against the live configuration baseline, change calendar and CAB restrictions. Ensures ZeroOps never acts during frozen windows or against policy.

anatomy.trigger: Proposed remediation action from Remediation Agent
anatomy.process: Check change calendar, CAB restrictions, CMDB baseline, rollback availability
anatomy.output: Approved (proceed) or Blocked (escalate) — all actions logged with full audit trail

agents.name: Capacity Planner
agents.desc: Continuously monitors resource utilisation trends and proactively recommends or executes scaling actions before thresholds are breached. Prevents incidents rather than resolving them.

anatomy.trigger: Resource utilisation trend crossing predictive threshold (not reactive threshold)
anatomy.process: Trend analysis over 30-day rolling window, workload forecasting, risk-adjusted scaling recommendation
anatomy.output: Proactive scaling action or recommendation — with business event correlation

agents.name: SoD Check Agent
agents.desc: Automated Segregation of Duties check for every access provisioning request. Integrates with SAP GRC and identity platforms to detect conflicts before roles are assigned.

anatomy.trigger: Access provisioning request received from ServiceNow
anatomy.process: Query SAP GRC for role conflict matrix, cross-reference requested roles against existing entitlements, calculate risk score
anatomy.output: Clean (auto-provision) or Conflict (HiTL with full violation detail and suggested controls)
